interpretation_note: Point estimate FAILS the pre-registered -2pp bar (-3.14pp). Caution before treating as real: the pruned ladder's noise_floor_finding demonstrated a 2.12pp pure-noise rung spread at this n (Q6 > its own f16 source, physically impossible as signal), and the CIs here overlap heavily. Per the refined goal (measure the full ladder, pick best size-to-performance), Q6/Q5 are measured regardless — a Q6/Q5 result back inside the band would demonstrate non-monotonicity (noise) a second time; all three rungs failing would be a genuine degradation signal.
